items.title: Memphis Grizzlies have selected an All-Rookie Team wing outside of the top ten three years in a row: GG Jackson II (FA), Jaylen Wells, Cedric Coward
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Memphis Grizzlies have selected an All-Rookie Team wing outside of the top ten three years in a row: GG Jackson II (FA), Jaylen Wells, Cedric Coward

Now get another shot at it with Karim Lopez.
